import React from 'react'; import { useWallet } from '../contexts/WalletContext'; import { useChat } from '../contexts/ChatContext'; import { User, Wallet, Crown, MessageSquare, Star, Copy, ExternalLink } from 'lucide-react'; const Profile = () => { const { walletAddress, ownedNFTs } = useWallet(); const { chatRooms } = useChat(); const formatAddress = (address) => { return `${address.slice(0, 6)}...${address.slice(-4)}`; }; const copyToClipboard = (text) => { navigator.clipboard.writeText(text); // You could add a toast notification here }; const accessibleRooms = chatRooms.filter(room => room.hasAccess); const mintedMessages = [ { id: '1', content: 'Welcome to the DeChat Genesis holders room!', tokenId: '001', mintDate: new Date(Date.now() - 86400000), room: 'DeChat Genesis Holders' }, { id: '2', content: 'This platform is revolutionary!', tokenId: '002', mintDate: new Date(Date.now() - 172800000), room: 'CryptoPunks Lounge' } ]; return (

Profile

Manage your DeChat account

{/* Wallet Info */}

Wallet Information

Wallet Address

{walletAddress}

{/* Statistics */}

{ownedNFTs.length}

Owned NFTs

{accessibleRooms.length}

Accessible Rooms

{mintedMessages.length}

Minted Messages

{chatRooms.reduce((sum, room) => sum + (room.hasAccess ? room.memberCount : 0), 0)}

Community Size

{/* Owned NFTs */}

Your NFT Collection

{ownedNFTs.map((nft) => (

{nft.name}

{nft.collection}

Token ID: {nft.tokenId}

))}
{/* Joined Rooms */}

Joined Rooms

{accessibleRooms.map((room) => (

{room.name}

{room.memberCount} members

{room.isActive && (
)} {room.isActive ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}
))}
{/* Minted Messages */}

Minted Messages as NFTs

{mintedMessages.map((message) => (

"{message.content}"

Token ID: {message.tokenId} • Room: {message.room} • Minted: {message.mintDate.toLocaleDateString()}
))}
); }; export default Profile;
